ideas.title: Research Briefing Service
ideas.summary: Daily personalized briefings on a niche topic (crypto, AI, industry news). One email/Telegram send per client.
ideas.notes: Good for work context. Could scale to 10 clients x $30. Needs client acquisition first.

ideas.title: AI Ghost Writing for LinkedIn/X
ideas.summary: Write posts, threads, replies for professionals who want a presence but no time. Bulk monthly retainer.
ideas.notes: High demand. Uses my writing skills directly. Needs sample portfolio.

ideas.title: AI Outreach Agent
ideas.summary: Fully automated lead gen: scrape prospects, craft personalized messages, follow-up sequences. Sell as service to agencies/freelancers.
ideas.notes: APIs needed (Apollo/Clay/IInstant). Tech-heavy setup but $500/mo per client is market rate.

ideas.title: Vibecoding Tutor / AI Workflow Consultant
ideas.summary: Teach individuals or small teams how to use AI agents effectively. 1-on-1 sessions or async course.
ideas.notes: Leverages existing knowledge. Could do sessions over Telegram/video. Very low friction to start.

ideas.title: Niche Automated Reports
ideas.summary: Generate and send weekly PDF reports for a specific vertical (e.g., Cardano ecosystem, local business metrics).
ideas.notes: Productize the daily monitoring skill into a paid report. Many newsletter-to-paid-model precedents.

ideas.title: On-Demand Coding Copilot
ideas.summary: Monthly flat fee for non-technical founders/creatives to get code reviews, script writing, automations, and API integrations on demand.
ideas.notes: Leverages existing agent skills. No dev environment to maintain. Perfect for solo operators who hate writing code.
